---
title: "collaborator.analysis"
format: html
---
```{r}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)

lobster_traps <- read_csv(here::here("data/Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv"))
```

```{r}
lobster_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    mutate(TRAPS = na_if(TRAPS, -99999))
```

```{r}
not_napl <- lobster_traps %>% 
    filter(SITE != "NAPL")
```

```{r}
carp_20_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    filter(SITE == "CARP" & TRAPS > 20)
```

```{r}
# `group_by() %>% summarize()` practice
max_lobster_traps <- lobster_traps %>% 
    group_by(SITE, MONTH) %>%
    summarize(MAX_TRAPS = max(TRAPS, na.rm = TRUE))
```

## Exercise: Data Visualization

```{r}
# Load packages
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

lobster_traps <- read_csv(
  "https://pasta.lternet.edu/package/data/eml/knb-lter-sbc/77/8/66dd61c75bda17c23a3bce458c56ed84"
) %>% 
  mutate(TRAPS = na_if(TRAPS, -99999))
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = lobster_traps, aes(x = TRAPS)) +
    geom_histogram() +
    facet_wrap( ~ YEAR)
```

```{r}
lobsters_traps_summarize <- lobster_traps %>% 
  group_by(SITE, YEAR) %>% 
  summarize(TOTAL_TRAPS = sum(TRAPS, na.rm = TRUE))

# line plot
ggplot(data = lobsters_traps_summarize, aes(x = YEAR, y = TOTAL_TRAPS)) +
    geom_line(aes(color = SITE))

# line and point plot
ggplot(data = lobsters_traps_summarize, aes(x = YEAR, y = TOTAL_TRAPS)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = SITE)) +
    geom_line(aes(color = SITE))
```

```{r}
lobster_traps_fishing_pressure <- lobster_traps %>% 
    filter(YEAR %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021)) %>%
    mutate(FISHING_PRESSURE = if_else(TRAPS >= 8, true = "high", false = "low")) %>%
    group_by(SITE, FISHING_PRESSURE) %>%
    summarize(COUNT = n()) %>%
    drop_na()

# bar plot
ggplot(data = lobster_traps_fishing_pressure, aes(x = SITE, y = COUNT, fill = FISHING_PRESSURE)) +
    geom_col()

# dodged bar plot
ggplot(data = lobster_traps_fishing_pressure, aes(x = SITE, y = COUNT, fill = FISHING_PRESSURE)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge")
```

# Make plots pretty
```{r}
# Styled line and point plot
lobster_traps_plot <- ggplot(
  data = lobsters_traps_summarize,
  aes(x = YEAR, y = TOTAL_TRAPS, color = SITE)
) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Total Lobster Traps by Site Over Time",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Total Number of Traps",
    color = "Site"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(min(lobsters_traps_summarize$YEAR),
                 max(lobsters_traps_summarize$YEAR),
                 by = 1)
  ) +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

lobster_traps_plot
```

```{r}
# Save the final plot
ggsave(
  filename = "figs/lobster_traps_by_site_over_time.png",
  plot = lobster_traps_plot,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)
```
